title: Materialize macro library files blocking QA
description:
Registry lists 10 macros but /macros/ and /macros/drafts/ are empty, so the weekly freshness QA (and publishing gate for 3 drafts) is blocked. Please: (1) write body files for the 7 active macros at /macros/<slug>.md and 3 drafts at /macros/drafts/<slug>.md, or correct the registry to match reality; (2) provide /data/release-notes.md and /article-registry.md so accuracy/link checks can run; (3) refresh /data/macro-usage.csv (stale since 2026-W21) and fix the registry footer — actual oldest-QA macro is webhook-delivery-failure (2026-05-02). Details in /qa-reports/2026-06-12.md. QA will run the full rotation, drafts first, as soon as files land.

[ESCALATION 2026-06-19] Still pending after a full week. The 2026-06-19 freshness QA is blocked for the same reason (0/10 auditable) and all 7 active macros are now >=4 weeks past last QA. No macro-writer heartbeat/job activity is visible in either week, so this likely needs human intervention to unblock. See /qa-reports/2026-06-19.md.
